_comment: Shared truth for Capstone V2 report + deck. Audited 2026-07-21 across worktrees. The consistency test (test/capstone-v2-consistency.test.mjs) fails if report/deck source diverge from these values. Status labels are the V2 vocabulary; authored/tested/built/device-validated are NOT collapsed.
project_title: Shadow: A Cryptographically Verifiable Evidence and Spatial Audit System for AI-Assisted Decisions
thesis: From AI answers to independently verifiable decision evidence.
author: Alex Ji

audit.note: New work (explainers, 3D scene contract, Three.js layouts) lives on sibling branches not yet merged to the V1 base 5106799; V1 was built from that base and is therefore stale.

tests.skips_reason: environment-gated (Mistral OCR key / live-network / OpenSSL feature) — not disabled coverage

council.value_semantics: persona prior — STANCE STRENGTH (not confidence, not probability of correctness)

capabilities.note: shared Unity/Three.js scene contract — AUTHORED + HOST-TESTED (Unity production integration still pending)
arc, layered DAG, timeline, hybrid 2D/3D + 2D fallback — RESEARCH-PROTOTYPE
3 workspaces + audit arc; Unity test evidence reported separately; DEVICE-VALIDATION-PENDING (Beam Pro)
structural seal of a third-party trace
semantic PRODUCTION evaluation pending — NOT device-pending
post-hoc, n<100, NOT a coverage certificate

honesty_guardrails: Cryptographic verification establishes integrity, not correctness.
A valid signature does not prove the source was truthful.
Fixture signing is not production signing.
Head-directed hover is not eye tracking.
No user study means no demonstrated 3D comprehension benefit.
Persona majority does not prove correctness.
Compliance persona does not constitute legal review.
No Beam Pro / XREAL device claim without device evidence.
